name: Informatica Inc.
description: Informatica Inc. is an enterprise cloud data management leader that empowers businesses to realize the transformative power of their data. The company's Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC) is an end-to-end platform powered by CLAIRE, its AI engine, which connects, manages, and unifies data across multi-cloud and hybrid systems. Informatica enables organizations to build a single source of truth, ensure data quality, govern data assets, and drive data-driven digital transformation.
